metadata.title: Claude Code Master 2026
metadata.description: 10 articulos curados sobre Claude Code (mayo 2026) - prompting, planning, skills, .md, MCP, novedades

sources.title: Best practices for Claude Code
sources.author: Anthropic
sources.summary: Guia oficial canonica con todos los patrones probados internamente: explore-plan-implement, CLAUDE.md tactico, permission modes, parallel sessions, fan-out, auto mode.

sources.title: Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills
sources.author: Anthropic Engineering
sources.summary: Anuncio y diseno conceptual de Agent Skills: carpetas con SKILL.md que el modelo descubre y carga on-demand.

sources.title: Building agents with the Claude Agent SDK
sources.author: Anthropic Engineering
sources.summary: Guia oficial del Claude Agent SDK (renombrado desde Claude Code SDK), con best practices para construir agentes propios.

sources.title: How Claude remembers your project (Memory)
sources.author: Anthropic
sources.summary: Doc canonico del sistema de memoria: CLAUDE.md vs auto memory, .claude/rules/, path-scoped rules, MEMORY.md, troubleshooting.

sources.title: Claude Code Changelog (oficial)
sources.author: Anthropic
sources.summary: Changelog oficial version por version (v2.1.x). Source of truth para que cambia mes a mes.

sources.title: The Complete Claude Code Guide (2026): Planning, Context Engineering, and High-Leverage Development
sources.author: Stan Sedberry
sources.summary: Guia comunitaria solida que sintetiza: setup, context structuring, plan mode workflows, cost optimization, scaling.

sources.title: 50 Claude Code Tips and Best Practices For Daily Use
sources.author: Vishwas Gopinath
sources.summary: 50 tacticas concretas y reproducibles para uso diario - la mayoria son micro-prompts y ajustes que se aplican en segundos.

sources.title: How Claude Code Builds a System Prompt
sources.author: Drew Breunig
sources.summary: Analisis tecnico profundo de como Claude Code ensambla dinamicamente su system prompt - util para entender que tunear y que no.

sources.title: Claude Code & Agent Memory: Best Practices for 2026
sources.author: Orchestrator.dev
sources.summary: Cuatro capas de memoria, auto memory, Memory Tool para API agents, y subagent memory con frontmatter - cobertura comunitaria de la novedad de v2.1.33+.

sources.title: The Best Claude Code Plugins, Skills & MCP Servers I Use Every Day
sources.author: Nicolas Fry
sources.summary: Stack practico de 7 plugins/skills/MCP servers de uso diario, con cuando usar cada uno y como combinarlos.
